text:
Perfect! Now you have global commands that work in ANY git repository:

## **Your Daily Commands:**

### **End your work day:**
```bash
git done "fixed the login issue and added dashboard"
```

### **Quick "done for today":**
```bash
git day
```

### **Review your work:**
```bash
git review          # Today's work
git review 2025-02-05  # Specific date
```

## **What happens automatically:**
‚úÖ Works in ANY git repository globally  
‚úÖ Adds all your changes  
‚úÖ Commits with timestamp  
‚úÖ Pushes to remote (if exists)  
‚úÖ Creates daily work log in that repo  
‚úÖ Tracks what you worked on  

Now you can go to any project folder and just type `git day` or `git done "description"` and it handles everything! üéâ

Try it in your current EYE project:
```bash
git day
```
